---
pagetitle: "Riccardo Spada - Home"
format: html
---

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-8}

## Hello!

I'm a PhD Candidate in the [Business Economics Group](https://www.wur.nl/en/chair-groups/business-science/business-economics) at [Wageningen University & Research](https://www.wur.nl/en).

My research focuses on agricultural economics and risk management. I'm passionate about data and personal finance.

R and Linux user.

:::

::: {.g-col-4 .profile-img-container}

![](assets/ProfilePic.jpg)

:::

:::
